what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset in the design-source channel; it identifies recent-pitches/p-47, references a binary blob, and labels it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, and timestamps
The blob is referenced as blob://b2:36eed9a1ddf11a49ec8df8a7e5757524 with mime image/jpeg
Image dimensions w and h are both 0
The source field is design_source_material and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
The body states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-47.jpg'
standouts: Declared as design ground-truth for a pitch image
Width and height are recorded as 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Blob reference uses a b2: hash URI scheme
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses image:// and blob:// URI schemes for addressability
Includes created timestamp and author session for provenance
concerns: Image dimensions are zero, suggesting missing metadata extraction
Links array is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
No descriptive caption or alt text is provided
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source pitch image with a blob pointer but unset dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are the width and height values zero for an image record?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-47.jpg contain?
How is this pitch image related to other entries in recent-pitches?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image, which matches; however, the record lacks extracted dimensions and relationships, so it is less informative than a full asset descriptor.
apparent_themes: Image cataloging in a channel memory ledger
intention_signals: It appears intended to make a design-source pitch image discoverable, addressable, and attributable as ground-truth material within a structured ledger.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record and blob pointer for a design-source pitch image, preserving provenance through id, channel, author session, and timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a metadata ledger entry for the design-source image asset recent-pitches/p-47, referencing blob b2:36eed9a1ddf11a49ec8df8a7e5757524 and declaring it design ground-truth with zero recorded dimensions.
